scope: offline static parity; electrical GPIO, pinctrl and runtime sysfs behavior are excluded

comparisons.surface: ELF, modinfo, KMI and reproducible build

comparisons.evidence: stage2_assembly_comparison.json records 14/19 strict exact functions and 17/19 instruction-exact functions
74 blocks, 111 edges and 66 ordered calls on both sides; candidate has 370 versus 380 instructions
stage2 semantic harness passes 26/26 over 11 directly modeled functions

blockers: two nominal KCFI signatures remain unresolved
nubia_hw_rf_band_show and nubia_hw_ver_probe are not instruction-identical
three instruction-identical functions still reference anonymous rodata at different linked offsets
eight microtasks lack direct isolated harness coverage
independent review and controlled hardware validation are pending
